positive: A stylized, symmetrical graphic design of an astronaut floating amongst nebula clouds and constellations. The astronaut's suit is depicted with clean, geometric lines and a deep cyan glow. The nebula features vibrant, swirling gradients of magenta, indigo, and teal, contrasting sharply with the deep black background. Central composition with strong, dynamic negative space. The art style should be a blend of retro-futurism and detailed celestial cartography, highly suitable for screen printing on apparel. Sharp vectors, clean silhouettes, high contrast, dramatic cosmic lighting.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low detail, ugly, noise, grainy, multiple limbs, bad anatomy
